name: The Pivot
effect: Reclassify a failure mode as a methodology component. This card is considered intentional.

clauses.name: RECLASSIFICATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If an outcome deviates from plan: The deviation is retroactively designated a learning loop.

clauses.name: DOCUMENTATION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the failure is documented: The documentation is considered a framework artifact.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: Next turn: The original plan is considered a draft.
